name: cbore_hole
description: Create a box with a counterbored hole (wider at top, narrower through)

name: csk_hole
description: Create a box with a countersunk hole (conical recess at top)

name: grid_holes
description: Create a plate with a rectangular grid array of holes

name: polar_holes
description: Create a circular plate with holes arranged in a polar/circular pattern

name: washer
description: Create a washer using cq_warehouse fastener library

name: bolt
description: Create a hex head bolt or screw using cq_warehouse

name: nut
description: Create a hex nut using cq_warehouse fastener library

name: helix
description: Create a helical coil by sweeping a circular cross-section along a helix path

name: multi_section_sweep
description: Loft through multiple cross-section profiles (e.g. circle at base, square at top)

name: constrained_assembly
description: Build a multi-part assembly with named parts and geometric constraints solved automatically

name: import_step
description: Import an existing STEP file into CadQuery and optionally translate it

name: export_step
description: Create a solid and export it to STEP, STL, or SVG file format

name: bolt_nut_assembly
description: Create an assembly of a hex bolt and matching hex nut using cq_warehouse

name: flange_bolt_pattern
description: Create a circular flange plate with a polar pattern of bolt holes

name: plate_with_bolts
description: Create a rectangular plate with corner mounting holes sized for bolts

name: bracket
description: L-shaped or T-shaped mounting bracket with optional gusset and mounting holes

name: enclosure
description: Hollow rectangular enclosure box with optional mounting bosses, lid slots and vent holes

name: pocket
description: Plate with rectangular or circular blind pocket (cavity) and optional mounting holes

name: stepped_shaft
description: Stepped cylindrical shaft with multiple diameters, optional keyway, and through-hole

name: shell
description: Hollow out a solid box leaving open faces — negative thickness shells inward

name: revolve
description: Revolve a 2D profile around an axis to create a solid of revolution (vase, bottle, shaft, ring)

name: text_on_face
description: Emboss or deboss text on a flat face of a box

name: dxf_import
description: Import a 2D DXF file and extrude it into a 3D solid

name: thread
description: Create an ISO metric threaded rod (external) or threaded insert (internal) using cq_warehouse

name: sweep
description: Sweep a circular or rectangular profile along a 3D spline path to create a pipe, tube, or curved rod

name: gear
description: Generate an involute spur gear with correct tooth profile, configurable module, teeth count, and bore

name: sphere
description: Create a sphere or dome (partial sphere)

name: cone
description: Create a cone or frustum (truncated cone) by lofting two circles

name: torus
description: Create a torus (donut / ring shape)

name: hex_prism
description: Create a hexagonal prism for bolt heads, sockets, hex adapters

name: rib
description: Create a flat plate with stiffening ribs

name: boss
description: Create a flat plate with cylindrical mounting bosses

name: snap_fit
description: Create a cantilever snap-fit latch for clip-together parts

name: t_slot
description: Create a T-slot aluminium extrusion profile (2020, 3030, 4040)

name: pulley
description: Create a V-groove or flat belt pulley with hub and bore

name: pcb_standoff
description: Create PCB mounting standoffs — hex or round posts with threaded bore

name: heat_sink
description: Create a heat sink with parallel cooling fins on a base plate

name: cable_clip
description: Create a cable management clip that snaps over a wire or cable

name: hook
description: Create a wall hook or S-hook for hanging objects

name: channel
description: Create a U-channel, C-channel, or L-angle structural profile

name: ring
description: Create a flat ring, spacer, or custom washer

name: pin
description: Create a dowel pin, locating pin, or spring pin

name: living_hinge
description: Create panels connected by a thin flexible living hinge for 3D printing

name: pipe_flange
description: Create a pipe section with flanges at both ends for bolted connections

name: handle
description: Create a grip handle or door handle with mounting base

name: helical_gear
description: Create a helical gear — smoother and quieter than spur gears (requires cq_gears)

name: bevel_gear
description: Create a bevel gear for intersecting shafts — 45° miter or custom angle (requires cq_gears)

name: ring_gear
description: Create an internal ring gear for planetary gear sets (requires cq_gears)

name: worm_gear_set
description: Create a worm and worm wheel set — high reduction, self-locking (requires cq_gears)

name: rack_gear
description: Create a linear rack gear that mates with a spur or helical pinion (requires cq_gears)

name: herringbone_gear
description: Create a herringbone double-helical gear — no axial thrust (requires cq_gears)

name: planetary_gear
description: Create a planetary gear set with sun, planets and ring gears (requires cq_gears)

name: massembly
description: Multi-part constrained assembly using cadquery-massembly MAssembly and Mate

name: spline_path_sweep
description: Sweep a profile along a spline path — s-curve, wave, arc, spiral pipes and tubes

name: spline_profile
description: Extrude a closed spline profile — teardrop, leaf, blob, star shapes

name: spline_surface
description: Loft between spline profiles — vase, hourglass, diamond, twist shapes

name: airfoil
description: Generate a NACA 4-digit airfoil wing section using spline interpolation

name: spline_transition
description: Smooth spline transition between two cross-sections — circle to square, round to rect

name: generic
description: General CadQuery code generation for shapes not covered by specific skills
